requirements.description: perm_revoke rejects an unparseable permission token before mutation and leaves the working-tree file unchanged.

would_fail_if: bad tokens are ignored and revoke returns Ok
a stub revoke accepts every token
the writer rewrites permissions before token validation

must_observe: call returns structured error code `config.invalid` or invalid permission token
error message contains literal `not a permission`

requirements.description: perm_revoke with unset caller identity fails closed with remediation_hint and no file mutation.

would_fail_if: a stub identity resolver returns admin when BUT_AGENT_HANDLE is missing
missing BUT_AGENT_HANDLE falls back to admin
missing identity is treated as anonymous allow

must_observe: call returns denial code `perm.denied` or identity resolution error

requirements.description: perm_list with unset caller identity fails closed with remediation_hint and reveals no other-principal authorities.

steps: capture returned error and any rendered output

must_observe: call returns denial code `perm.denied` or identity resolution error
output does not include `reviews:write` for rust-implementer

requirements.description: API and CLI denial assertions for perm/group require code, message, non-empty remediation_hint, and CLI exit code 1.
requirements.verify: cargo test -p but-api perm_denials_include_remediation_hint group_denials_include_remediation_hint && cargo test -p but perm_denials_include_remediation_hint group_denials_include_remediation_hint

would_fail_if: a static CLI renderer prints code only and drops remediation_hint

steps: run denied but-api perm_grant, perm_revoke, perm_list, and group mutator calls
run denied CLI `but perm` and `but group` commands through env.but(...).assert()
capture structured API errors and CLI stderr

must_observe: each API denial contains code, message, and remediation_hint length `> 0`

requirements.description: revoke bad token is an error and unchanged file
revoke with unset caller identity denies with remediation hint
list with unset caller identity denies with remediation hint and no recon
API denials for perm/group include remediation_hint
CLI denials for perm/group include remediation_hint and exit 1

tests: cargo test -p but-api perm_denials_include_remediation_hint group_denials_include_remediation_hint && cargo test -p but perm_denials_include_remediation_hint group_denials_include_remediation_hint
commands.typecheck: cargo check -p but-api --all-targets && cargo check -p but --all-targets

known_external_blocker.description: Current master f7de0e202c has a Sprint06a but-api all-targets compile failure in crates/but-api/tests/governance_api.rs unresolved imports governance_status_read/group_add_member_cmd/perm_grant_cmd. Do not modify governance_api.rs unless it is truly required for CLI-REM-002, which it is not in scope. Run narrow AC/TC commands and document this as pre-existing if broad cargo check/test hits it.
